_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source preset(s) for clarity-api (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). The clarity_insights tool returns a {data:[{metricName, information:[...]}]} export; each metric becomes a :BehaviorInsight-shaped document. For full typed-node ingestion (project/session/insight/dimension + summary) use the native clarity_ingest_insights tool. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS.
